Off Calendar Apr-10-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demands For Production And Privilege Log; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joel D. Adler, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Squire, Sanders & Dempsey, LLP
A. Mark Hom, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Nyppe Holdings, LLC

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified.
Plaintiff Sqquire, Sanders & Dempsey, LLP's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demands For Production And Privilege Log, Request For Sanctions.
1. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demands For Production And Privilege Log granted:
a. Within twenty days of service of this order, defendant shall produce all documents identified in its responses to request for production of documents-except for documents claimed as privileged;
b. Within twenty days of service of this order, defendant shall provide a code-compliant privilege log identifying documents subject to plaintiff's request that are claimed as privileged.
2. Request for sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue against defendant in the sum of $540.00, payable within thirty days of service of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demands For Production And Privilege Log; Request For Monetary Sanctions
